name: DHCP Server Callout DLL Registry Modification
description: Detection of suspicious modifications to DHCP Server Callout DLL registry keys, indicating potential persistence or privilege escalation.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the registry modification event.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname where the registry modification occurred.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process made the registry change.

parameters.name: ProcessName
parameters.description: The name of the process that modified the registry.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the process image that modified the registry.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the process that modified the registry.

parameters.name: TargetObject
parameters.description: The full registry key path that was modified.

parameters.name: Details
parameters.description: The new value written to the registry key (e.g., the DLL path or enabled state).

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID (expected to be 13).

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The name of the Sigma rule that triggered the event, if applicable.
